instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: A new student
task.initialEmail: Hi,||A new student is joining our class tomorrow, and our teacher asked us to help her. [1]Can you show her around the school with me?[/1]||[2]Should we invite her to sit with us at lunch?[/2]||[3]What clubs should we tell her about?[/3] She likes sport and music.||[4]Do you think we should give her a map of the school?[/4]||See you tomorrow||Hannah

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Hannah,||Thanks for your message. [1]Yes, I can show her around the school with you tomorrow morning. I know where most of the classrooms are.[/1]||[2]I agree that we should invite her to sit with us at lunch because she may feel nervous on her first day.[/2]||[3]We should tell her about the football club and the music club because they match her interests.[/3]||[4]I don’t think we need to give her a map because we can show her the important places ourselves.[/4]||She will probably feel much better.||See you tomorrow,||Amy
